description: You are an Urban Planner designing a community pocket park in an empty 20m x 30m city lot. Transform this space into a fully furnished public park by dividing the lot into at least three distinct named surface areas (e.g., Main Plaza, Picnic Lawn, Sand Pit) and applying distinct floor colors or textures to at least two of them. The park must include at least 12 vegetation items, 6 public seating items, and 4 outdoor lights. Document the sizes of pathways or the overall lot with at least two dimension lines. Render a 3D presentation image to ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/park_presentation.png and save the project to ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/pocket_park_final.sh3d.
